# DcernX

> DcernX is the operating layer for private investment teams — venture capital, accelerators, venture studios, angel syndicates, family offices, private equity funds and startup programs. It combines structured intake, agentic due diligence and audit-grade decision records in one workspace.

DcernX is built by P101 Limited (UK, company no. 17063831). The platform turns ~20 hours of analyst diligence into ~12 minutes of agentic research per opportunity, with every claim cited and every decision evidenced.

## Who it's for

- Accelerators and incubators
- Venture studios
- Venture capital firms (pre-seed through growth)
- Angel investors and syndicates
- Family offices (single and multi)
- Private equity funds
- Corporate venture, government and university startup programs

## What it does

- Unified intake for inbound, referrals and partner forms
- Agentic primary research across 12 tracks (strategy, market, competition, team, financial, regulatory, negative media, risk, and more)
- IC-ready memos generated from underlying evidence
- Auditable decision records and portfolio memory
- Sponsor / LP reporting on demand
